src: Anime figure of a flame-haired swordsman on a plain black metal base with a slender katana, in a dynamic pose with white flame cape and red katana, battle-ready stance.
edit: A cotton candy-inspired swordsman with pink and blue hair, on a fluffy base like a sugar cloud. Holds a katana with a sugary glaze and red tint, posed dynamically. Wears a cape like pastel sugar strands.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, slightly right. Left foot forward, right foot back, both hands holding a raised katana, on a wood-grain tabletop, with a blurred dark vertical support on the rear left and a pale wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, left foot forward, right foot back, hands gripping a katana raised overhead, on a wood-grain tabletop, with a dark support rear left and a pale wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, closeup, with her face, body, and katana centered on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: A figure is viewed from an eye-level frontal angle on a dark wooden table with a keyboard and a turned-off computer screen behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle from the left, placed on a dark plastic table with a black leather chair on the left and a dark wood office drawer in the top right corner.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The figure is viewed from above front, on a dark wooden table, with a keyboard and a turned-off computer screen behind her.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: Figure seen from a slight overhead angle, skewed right, left foot forward, right foot back, gripping a katana overhead. Stands on a fluffy pink cotton candy cloud. Background shows a blurred dark pillar of swirling pastel colors on the rear left and a dreamy pale sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, left foot forward, right foot back, holding a pastel katana overhead, standing on a swirling cotton candy table with blurred candy-striped support rear left and a pale sugar-coated wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The figure appears from an overhead angle, with face and katana vibrant against a sugary pastel landscape. Her features and attire are in pink and blue, blending with cloud-like surroundings. The katana has a rainbow-like sheen.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The figure is viewed from an eye-level frontal angle, sitting on a vibrant pink and blue swirled table. Behind her is a fluffy wall colored like pastel marshmallows, creating a cotton candy world.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle from the left, on a pastel pink table. A fluffy chair sits back left. In the top right, a candy-striped drawer reflects the cotton candy theme.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The figure, seen from an elevated angle, in a pastel cotton candy world. She sits on a fluffy table like spun sugar. Behind her, a candy-colored box and a computer-shaped candy in pink jelly complete the scene.
